sigWerErrors.reason: 'harfim' (my letter) vs 'harfini' (your letter) changes the subject of the sentence, which can confuse the meaning but the overall context is still understandable.
Omitting 'değil' (not) removes a negation, which can change the meaning of the sentence significantly.
Minor misspelling of a proper noun, still recognizable as the same name.
